post.description: Uploads multiple files (PDF, DOCX, TXT, or MD) to a specific data source in one request. Only works for data sources of type "files". Automatically triggers indexing once after all files are uploaded.

parameters.description: Unique identifier of the data source

files.description: Files to upload (PDF, DOCX, TXT, or MD). Maximum 100 files.

additionalProperties.description: Optional metadata fields. Format: metadata_{identifier} where identifier matches part of the filename. Value should be JSON string.

post.description: This endpoint processes emails from Microsoft Outlook using AI classification and routing. The resolver should be able to use client-created agents stored in the database for email processing. When an email is classified, the system should check if there are any client-created agents that match the email category or purpose, use the appropriate agent configuration and instructions for processing, and route emails to the correct processor based on classification and available agents.

info.title: Cogit API
info.description: API documentation for cogit ai organizations platform

totalAgents.description: Total number of agents in the system

requestsToday.description: Total requests made today across all agents

totalRequests.description: Total requests made across all agents

overallSuccessRate.description: Overall success rate as a percentage (0-100)

averageConfidence.description: Average confidence score across all agents (0-1)

totalDataSources.description: Total data sources in the system

date.description: ISO date string for the data point

name.description: Agent name for the data point

data.description: Array of success rate data points

id.description: Unique identifier for the data source

description.example: AI agent specialized in customer service inquiries

model.description: AI model used by the agent

prompt.example: You are a helpful AI assistant. Please provide accurate and helpful responses based on the context provided.

emailTemplate.description: Latest email template generated for the agent

screenTemplate.description: Latest screen template generated for the agent

tenantId.description: Tenant ID associated with the agent

dataSources.description: Data sources associated with this agent

createdAt.description: Date when the agent was created

updatedAt.description: Date when the agent was last updated

description.example: AI agent specialized in customer service inquiries

model.description: AI model to use (e.g., gemini-2.5-flash, claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929)

temperature.description: Temperature setting for AI responses (0.0 to 1.0)

prompt.example: You are a helpful AI assistant. Please provide accurate and helpful responses based on the context provided.

tenantId.description: Tenant ID associated with the agent

data_source_id.description: Data source ID to link to this agent (sent to AI@Org for canonical config shape)

description.example: AI agent specialized in customer service inquiries

model.description: AI model used by the agent

maxTokens.description: Maximum tokens for the agent response

prompt.description: Prompt template for the agent (or instructions from AI@Org)
prompt.example: You are a helpful AI assistant. Please provide accurate and helpful responses based on the context provided.

instructions.example:
# Agent Instructions

This agent specializes in...

config.description: Agent configuration from AI@Org (config.yaml as JSON)

emailTemplate.description: Email template from AI@Org (HTML or object)

tenantId.description: Tenant ID associated with the agent

errorMessage.description: Error message when agent creation fails (from AI@Org)
errorMessage.example: Failed to connect to external API

metadata.description: Metadata for validation errors and creation summary

response.description: The AI-generated response to the user message
response.example: Based on our company policies, remote work is allowed for up to 3 days per week...

agentId.description: The agent ID that generated the response

agentName.description: The agent name that generated the response

userMessage.example: What are our company policies regarding remote work?

contextChunksCount.description: Number of relevant chunks used for context

contextChunks.description: List of chunks used for context

toolResults.description: Tool outputs (transcription, recordings, customer data, etc.)

result.description: Structured result object (for JSON-output agents like Invoice Processor)

executionId.description: Execution ID for polling live tool steps (when sessionId was provided)

message.example: Agent ist nicht aktiv. Bitte aktivieren Sie den Agenten im Admin-Panel oder verwenden Sie einen anderen Agenten.

emailDataSchema.description: Email data schema for template variables

actions.description: Actions associated with the screen template

tenantId.description: The ID of the tenant making the request

agentId.description: The ID of the agent to use for context and rewriting

receivedEmailContent.description: The received email content that the user is responding to
receivedEmailContent.example: Hi Sarah, I wanted to follow up on the project timeline. We are experiencing some delays due to resource constraints and may need to push the deadline by 2 weeks. Please let me know your thoughts.

userDraftResponse.description: The user's draft response to the received email that needs to be rewritten
userDraftResponse.example: Hi John, got your email about delays. I understand the situation. Let's discuss this and figure out a solution.

rewrittenResponse.description: The AI-rewritten response to the received email
rewrittenResponse.example: Dear John, Thank you for reaching out regarding the project timeline. I understand the challenges you're facing with resource constraints. Let's schedule a meeting to discuss potential solutions and see how we can work together to minimize the impact of these delays.

contextChunksCount.description: Number of relevant chunks used for context

contextChunks.description: List of chunks used for context

session_id.description: Session ID for maintaining conversation context

message.description: User message to send to the converser agent
message.example: I need to create a customer service agent

generate_screen.description: Whether to generate screen template for UI display

body.description: Body content of the screen template as an array of strings
example: i can help you build a custom ai agent.
what kind of agent would you like to create?

actions.description: Actions available on the screen template

message.example: I can help you create a customer service agent. What specific features do you need?

session_id.description: Session ID for maintaining conversation context

agent_created.description: Whether an agent was created during this interaction

created_agent_id.description: ID of the created agent (if agent_created is true)

created_agent_name.description: Name of the created agent (if agent_created is true)

data_source_id.description: ID of the data source associated with the created agent (if agent_created is true)

screen_template.description: Screen template generated by ScreenMaker for UI display

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the response in ISO 8601 format

id.description: Unique identifier for activity log entry

description.example: Agent "Registration Agent" was created by user@example.com

metadata.description: Additional metadata for error details and debugging

createdAt.description: Date when the tenant was created

updatedAt.description: Date when the tenant was last updated

emailProcessingEnabled.description: Whether email processing is enabled for this tenant

updatedAt.description: Date when the file was last updated

description.example: Chat widget for the main company website

websiteWidgetBranding.description: Widget branding configuration (only for website widgets)

whitelistedDomains.description: List of whitelisted domains for the deployment

count.description: Number of emails to process. If not specified, defaults to 20.

days.description: Number of days to look back for emails. If not specified, fetches latest emails regardless of time.

ignore_last_execution.description: Ignore last execution timestamp. Useful for testing or manual runs.

reprocess.description: Allow reprocessing emails already in database. Use only for testing purposes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the email processing record

emailId.description: Unique identifier for the email from Microsoft Graph API

createdTimestamp.description: When the email was added to the system

stateChangedAt.description: When the state was last changed

processedByAgentId.description: ID of the agent that processed this email

agentName.description: Name of the agent that processed this email

emailBody.example: Hello, I am interested in your product...

tenantId.description: Tenant ID associated with this email processing

emailId.description: Unique identifier for the email from Microsoft Graph API

id.description: Unique identifier for the cron job configuration

enabled.description: Whether the cron job is enabled

interval.description: Cron expression for the job interval

enabled.description: Whether to enable or disable the cron job

tenantId.description: Tenant ID (optional, defaults to current user tenant)

message.example: Invitation created and email sent successfully

email.description: Email associated with the invitation if valid

user.description: User information if created or found

metadata.description: Optional metadata for additional details (error info, stack traces, etc.)

tenantId.description: Optional tenant ID (uses default if not provided)

description.example: Searches the FAQ database for relevant answers
